summary: AC1-AC10 pass with full local behavior proof on the implementation revision and live readback proof on the final published follow-up revision.
residualRisks: A repeated local Playwright rerun on the final prompt-polish follow-up commit hit a false preview-port conflict after the earlier successful run; the final follow-up revision was verified by npm run check and live bundle readback instead of a second clean local E2E transcript.
Perceived image delight and sound character still depend on the host device and Zoom share-sound settings.
